{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk / Admin Officer",
  "description": "Leytrust Integrated Solutions Limited is a dynamic financial and business solutions company dedicated to empowering individuals, entrepreneurs, and small businesses through innovative and accessible services. The company is committed to promoting financial inclusion by providing practical financial solutions that help customers grow their businesses, improve cash flow, and achieve financial stability.

Leytrust offers a wide range of services including micro lending, target savings, investment solutions, accounting and bookkeeping services, and e-commerce support. The company also provides flexible Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) solutions designed to make essential products and services more affordable and accessible to customers.

With a strong focus on integrity, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Leytrust Integrated Solutions Ltd combines technology-driven services with personalized support to meet the evolving needs of businesses and individuals. Through its solutions, the company aims to simplify financial access, support business growth, and create sustainable economic opportunities within communities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk / Admin Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
As a Front Desk &amp; Admin Officer, you will be responsible for:


	Managing the front desk, greeting visitors, and handling incoming calls professionally.
	Coordinate appointments, meetings schedules, and interface with clients on daily basis
	Maintain office records, files, and documentation in an organized manner.
	Manage office supplies, equipment, and stationery, ensuring timely replenishment.
	Handle petty cash requests, disbursements, and reconciliations accurately.
	Assisting in the preparation of reports, letters, and official correspondence.
	Support administrative processes, including travel arrangements and office logistics.
	Liaise with vendors and service providers for office maintenance and procurement.
	Ensure a professional and secure reception area and office environment.
	Assist with company events, internal communications, and ad hoc administrative tasks.
	Performs other related duties as required.


Salary
N70,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Leytrustltd@gmail.com and copy: info@leytrustfinance.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",

  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

  },

Front Desk / Admin Officer Job at Leytrust Integrated Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Leytrust Integrated Solutions Limited is a dynamic financial and business solutions company dedicated to empowering individuals, entrepreneurs, and small businesses through innovative and accessible services. The company is committed to promoting financial inclusion by providing practical financial solutions that help customers grow their businesses, improve cash flow, and achieve financial stability.

Leytrust offers a wide range of services including micro lending, target savings, investment solutions, accounting and bookkeeping services, and e-commerce support. The company also provides flexible Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) solutions designed to make essential products and services more affordable and accessible to customers.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



With a strong focus on integrity, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Leytrust Integrated Solutions Ltd combines technology-driven services with personalized support to meet the evolving needs of businesses and individuals. Through its solutions, the company aims to simplify financial access, support business growth, and create sustainable economic opportunities within communities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk / Admin Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
As a Front Desk & Admin Officer, you will be responsible for:


	Managing the front desk, greeting visitors, and handling incoming calls professionally.
	Coordinate appointments, meetings schedules, and interface with clients on daily basis
	Maintain office records, files, and documentation in an organized manner.
	Manage office supplies, equipment, and stationery, ensuring timely replenishment.
	Handle petty cash requests, disbursements, and reconciliations accurately.
	Assisting in the preparation of reports, letters, and official correspondence.
	Support administrative processes, including travel arrangements and office logistics.
	Liaise with vendors and service providers for office maintenance and procurement.
	Ensure a professional and secure reception area and office environment.
	Assist with company events, internal communications, and ad hoc administrative tasks.
	Performs other related duties as required.


Salary
N70,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] and copy: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Speech Therapist",
  "description": "Kels global ventures is a recruitment company that seeks to provide business solutions to satisfy her clients needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Speech Therapist

Job Location: Kado, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We&#39;re seeking a qualified Speech Therapist to join our rehabilitation team.
	The successful candidate will assess, diagnose, and treat patients with communication and swallowing disorders.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Speech-Language Pathology
	At least 2 years of experience in a rehabilitation setting.
	Registration with the Medical Rehabilitation Therapists Board of Nigeria (MRTB)


Work Schedule:


	Monday to Friday: 8:00 am - 5:00 pm
	Saturday: 9:00 am - 2:00 pm.


What We Offer


	Salary: N250,000 monthly.
	Opportunity to work with a dynamic team
	Professional development opportunities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: kelsgloballtd@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Speech Therapist Job at Kels Global Ventures




        
    

        
        Kels global ventures is a recruitment company that seeks to provide business solutions to satisfy her clients needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Speech Therapist

Job Location: Kado, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We're seeking a qualified Speech Therapist to join our rehabilitation team.
	The successful candidate will assess, diagnose, and treat patients with communication and swallowing disorders.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Bachelor's Degree in Speech-Language Pathology
	At least 2 years of experience in a rehabilitation setting.
	Registration with the Medical Rehabilitation Therapists Board of Nigeria (MRTB)


Work Schedule:


	Monday to Friday: 8:00 am - 5:00 pm
	Saturday: 9:00 am - 2:00 pm.


What We Offer


	Salary: N250,000 monthly.
	Opportunity to work with a dynamic team
	Professional development opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing Lead",
  "description": "Taeillo is a modern Nigerian furniture design and manufacturing company that specializes in creating stylish, affordable, and space-saving furniture for homes and offices. The brand operates with a strong e-commerce model, allowing customers to browse, customize, and order furniture online with seamless delivery services across Nigeria and beyond.

Taeillo focuses on combining contemporary African-inspired design with functionality, targeting young professionals, urban homeowners, and businesses looking for premium yet accessible interior solutions. The company is known for its innovative approach to furniture retail, fast-growing online presence, and commitment to quality craftsmanship.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Lead

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Chief Executive Officer

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Lead will be responsible for owning and driving Taeillo&rsquo;s digital marketing strategy across all channels. This is a growth-focused, revenue-driven role &mdash; not a content scheduling position.
	The ideal candidate thinks in data, moves fast, and knows how to turn digital touchpoints into sales.
	They will lead Taeillo&rsquo;s online marketing efforts, manage the Social Media Associate, and work closely with the CEO and sales team to grow our customer base, increase online revenue, and strengthen the Taeillo brand across Nigeria, Kenya, and beyond.


Job Responsibilities
Digital Strategy &amp; Growth:


	Develop and execute Taeillo&rsquo;s end-to-end digital marketing strategy across SEO, SEM, email, paid social, and display advertising.
	Own the digital marketing calendar, ensuring campaigns are planned, executed, and reviewed on time.
	Identify and pursue new digital growth opportunities including influencer partnerships, affiliate marketing, and emerging platforms.
	Drive e-commerce growth by continuously optimising the customer journey from first click through to purchase on taeillo.com.


Performance Marketing:


	Plan, manage, and optimise paid advertising campaigns across Meta (Facebook &amp; Instagram), Google, and TikTok with a clear focus on ROAS and customer acquisition cost (CAC).
	Set campaign budgets, monitor daily spend, and adjust targeting and creative to maximise performance.
	Run A/B tests on ad creatives, landing pages, and audience segments to continuously improve results.


Analytics &amp; Reporting:


	Track, analyse, and report on all digital marketing KPIs weekly &mdash; including website traffic, conversion rate, CAC, ROAS, and revenue attribution.
	Use data to drive decisions and present clear insights and recommendations to the CEO.
	Maintain a strong understanding of the customer funnel and identify drop-off points for improvement.


Email &amp; CRM Marketing:


	Build and manage Taeillo&rsquo;s email and SMS marketing programme &mdash; from list growth and segmentation to automated flows and promotional campaigns.
	Develop retention strategies to increase repeat purchases and customer lifetime value.


Team &amp; Brand Leadership:


	Lead and manage the Social Media Associate, providing direction, feedback, and support to ensure content aligns with the broader marketing strategy.
	Collaborate with the product and design teams to ensure all campaigns accurately reflect the Taeillo brand identity, tone of voice, and aesthetic.
	Brief creatives effectively and review all digital marketing materials before publication.
	Stay ahead of trends in the African e-commerce, lifestyle, and furniture space and proactively bring ideas to the table.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in digital marketing, with at least 2 years in a lead or senior role.
	Proven track record of planning and running paid campaigns on Meta Ads and Google Ads with measurable results.
	Strong understanding of e-commerce metrics and how digital marketing drives online revenue.
	Hands-on experience with tools such as Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite, Klaviyo or Mailchimp, and Shopify or similar e-commerce platforms.
	A strategic thinker who is equally comfortable getting into the details and executing.
	Excellent written communication skills with an ability to understand and protect brand voice.
	Experience in a lifestyle, fashion, consumer goods, or e-commerce brand is a strong advantage.
	Pan-African market experience or awareness is a plus.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: peopleandculture@taeillo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Digital Marketing Lead Job at Taeillo Furniture




        
    

        
        Taeillo is a modern Nigerian furniture design and manufacturing company that specializes in creating stylish, affordable, and space-saving furniture for homes and offices. The brand operates with a strong e-commerce model, allowing customers to browse, customize, and order furniture online with seamless delivery services across Nigeria and beyond.

Taeillo focuses on combining contemporary African-inspired design with functionality, targeting young professionals, urban homeowners, and businesses looking for premium yet accessible interior solutions. The company is known for its innovative approach to furniture retail, fast-growing online presence, and commitment to quality craftsmanship.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Digital Marketing Lead

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Chief Executive Officer

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Lead will be responsible for owning and driving Taeillo’s digital marketing strategy across all channels. This is a growth-focused, revenue-driven role — not a content scheduling position.
	The ideal candidate thinks in data, moves fast, and knows how to turn digital touchpoints into sales.
	They will lead Taeillo’s online marketing efforts, manage the Social Media Associate, and work closely with the CEO and sales team to grow our customer base, increase online revenue, and strengthen the Taeillo brand across Nigeria, Kenya, and beyond.


Job Responsibilities
Digital Strategy & Growth:


	Develop and execute Taeillo’s end-to-end digital marketing strategy across SEO, SEM, email, paid social, and display advertising.
	Own the digital marketing calendar, ensuring campaigns are planned, executed, and reviewed on time.
	Identify and pursue new digital growth opportunities including influencer partnerships, affiliate marketing, and emerging platforms.
	Drive e-commerce growth by continuously optimising the customer journey from first click through to purchase on taeillo.com.


Performance Marketing:


	Plan, manage, and optimise paid advertising campaigns across Meta (Facebook & Instagram), Google, and TikTok with a clear focus on ROAS and customer acquisition cost (CAC).
	Set campaign budgets, monitor daily spend, and adjust targeting and creative to maximise performance.
	Run A/B tests on ad creatives, landing pages, and audience segments to continuously improve results.


Analytics & Reporting:


	Track, analyse, and report on all digital marketing KPIs weekly — including website traffic, conversion rate, CAC, ROAS, and revenue attribution.
	Use data to drive decisions and present clear insights and recommendations to the CEO.
	Maintain a strong understanding of the customer funnel and identify drop-off points for improvement.


Email & CRM Marketing:


	Build and manage Taeillo’s email and SMS marketing programme — from list growth and segmentation to automated flows and promotional campaigns.
	Develop retention strategies to increase repeat purchases and customer lifetime value.


Team & Brand Leadership:


	Lead and manage the Social Media Associate, providing direction, feedback, and support to ensure content aligns with the broader marketing strategy.
	Collaborate with the product and design teams to ensure all campaigns accurately reflect the Taeillo brand identity, tone of voice, and aesthetic.
	Brief creatives effectively and review all digital marketing materials before publication.
	Stay ahead of trends in the African e-commerce, lifestyle, and furniture space and proactively bring ideas to the table.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
	3–5 years of experience in digital marketing, with at least 2 years in a lead or senior role.
	Proven track record of planning and running paid campaigns on Meta Ads and Google Ads with measurable results.
	Strong understanding of e-commerce metrics and how digital marketing drives online revenue.
	Hands-on experience with tools such as Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite, Klaviyo or Mailchimp, and Shopify or similar e-commerce platforms.
	A strategic thinker who is equally comfortable getting into the details and executing.
	Excellent written communication skills with an ability to understand and protect brand voice.
	Experience in a lifestyle, fashion, consumer goods, or e-commerce brand is a strong advantage.
	Pan-African market experience or awareness is a plus.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Physiotherapist

|Job Location: Kado, Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and compassionate Physiotherapist to assess, diagnose, and treat patients with physical injuries, mobility challenges, and movement disorders. The successful candidate will develop personalized treatment plans to improve patients&rsquo; strength, mobility, and overall quality of life.


Responsibilities


	Assess patients&rsquo; physical conditions and develop appropriate treatment plans
	Provide hands-on therapy, exercise programs, and rehabilitation services
	Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans as needed
	Educate patients and caregivers on injury prevention and home exercises
	Maintain accurate patient records and reports.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with a minimum of 2 years of relevant work experience
	Valid MRTB license (mandatory)
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills


Salary
N180,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: kelsgloballtd@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Physiotherapist

|Job Location: Kado, Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and compassionate Physiotherapist to assess, diagnose, and treat patients with physical injuries, mobility challenges, and movement disorders. The successful candidate will develop personalized treatment plans to improve patients’ strength, mobility, and overall quality of life.


Responsibilities

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Van Sales Representative",
  "description": "Kels Global Ventures is a recruitment company that seeks to provide business solutions to satisfy her clients needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Van Sales Representative

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Van Sales Representative will be responsible for driving company vans to assigned routes, selling products directly to customers, managing in-route sales activities, and ensuring accurate reporting of sales and collections.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive company van to assigned routes and customer locations.
	Sell and distribute products directly to customers.
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships.
	Collect payments and submit accurate sales records.
	Ensure proper handling and basic maintenance of the assigned van.
	Provide daily / weekly sales and activity reports to the City Head.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification: OND.
	Minimum of 1 year relevant sales or field experience.
	Interested candidates must reside in the required locations.
	Valid driver&rsquo;s license (mandatory).
	Ability to drive a manual vehicle (must).


Salary
N150,000 - N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: kelsgloballtd@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Van Sales Representative Job at Kels Global Ventures




        
    

        
        Kels Global Ventures is a recruitment company that seeks to provide business solutions to satisfy her clients needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Van Sales Representative

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Van Sales Representative will be responsible for driving company vans to assigned routes, selling products directly to customers, managing in-route sales activities, and ensuring accurate reporting of sales and collections.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive company van to assigned routes and customer locations.
	Sell and distribute products directly to customers.
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships.
	Collect payments and submit accurate sales records.
	Ensure proper handling and basic maintenance of the assigned van.
	Provide daily / weekly sales and activity reports to the City Head.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification: OND.
	Minimum of 1 year relevant sales or field experience.
	Interested candidates must reside in the required locations.
	Valid driver’s license (mandatory).
	Ability to drive a manual vehicle (must).


Salary
N150,000 - N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
